summary.lv: Storent meklē vecāko DevOps inženieri iRMS platformas Azure infrastruktūras pārvaldībai — relīzes, drošība, stabilitāte TEST un PROD vidēs, CI/CD automatizācija un MS SQL Server administrēšana.
summary.en: Storent is hiring a Senior DevOps Engineer to own the iRMS Azure infrastructure — releases, security and stability in TEST and PROD, CI/CD automation, and MS SQL Server administration.
